title: Xtra Spicy American Samphire Skillet
description: A spicy and crumbly solo dinner dish featuring samphire, cooked in a ttukbaegi earthenware skillet, low in fat and perfect for a weeknight meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a ttukbaegi earthenware skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the chopped bell pepper and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the sliced jalapeno pepper and cook for 1 minute.
Add the ground turkey and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until it is no longer pink, about 5 minutes.
Add the samphire, tomato paste, chili flakes, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer, covered, for 10 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the heat and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the samphire mixture hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
